meaning: <斯瓦希里>n.&int.哈兰比(齐心协力的意思)
examples: They held a harambee meeting to raise funds for a new classroom.
All repeat "Harambee!" seven times and each person drinks from the cup.
That person then drinks from the cup and raises it high saying "Harambee" which means "Let's all pull together."
Harambee Stars coach Mohammed Kheri has described the allegations as outrageous and pure madness.
"Harambee Stars will resume training this week for the first match on 4 September, " he said.
